strategy: Avoid casting Wards. Both harmful and helpful Wards make Billy drop a delayed ~125 Fire hit on all wizards after 4 rounds.
Expect Legion Shields on him at round 1 and every 6 rounds; pack pierce or shatter, or hit off-school since he resists Fire only 3% but takes +17% from Storm and Life.
Keep helpful Charms minimal. Each one you cast draws a Weakness onto that wizard.
Any damage on Billy or his Butcher returns his Natural Attack, so do your setup in as few damaging actions as possible.
He is not stunable and only has 3,350 health; one blade plus a trap and an AoE clears him and the Butcher together.
cheatNotes: Casting a harmful Ward makes Billy set a Fire hit that lands ~125 on all wizards 4 rounds later.
Casting a helpful Ward triggers the same delayed ~125 Fire hit on all wizards after 4 rounds.
He shields himself with three Legion Shields at round 1 and repeats every 6 rounds; be ready to break or pierce them.
At round 3 he lays a +25% Mass Fire Trap on the wizards, raising the Fire damage you take.
Every helpful Charm you cast makes him hit that recipient with a Weakness.
Any time you damage Billy or his Butcher he answers with his Natural Attack on that wizard.
